--- 
title: "Minería de Datos II"
subtitle: "Economía e Inteligencia de Negocios"
author: "MSc. Alvaro Chirino Gutierrez"
description: "Apuntes para la materia de Minería de Datos II"
date: "Periodo I-2026"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
output: 
  bookdown::gitbook: default
  bookdown::epub_book: default
documentclass: book
graphics: yes
github-repo: alvarolimber/md26
bibliography: _aux/ref_md.bib
nocite: '@*'
pandoc_args: ["-Fpandoc-crossref"]
---

# Prefacio {-}

```{r fig.align='center', echo=FALSE, include=identical(knitr:::pandoc_to(), 'html'), fig.link='https://www.crcpress.com/product/isbn/9781138700109'}
#knitr::include_graphics('_fig/cover.png', dpi = NA)
```

<a rel="license" href="http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/"><img alt="Creative Commons License" style="border-width:0" src="https://i.creativecommons.org/l/by-nc-sa/4.0/88x31.png" /></a><br />Este documento de [Alvaro Chirino](https://twitter/alvarochirinog) esta bajo la licencia de <a rel="license" href="http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/">Creative Commons Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International License</a>.

## Referencias  {-}
